name: scorecard_period_present
expression: scorecard_period IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(scorecard_period)) > 0
description: scorecard_period is required for Supplier Scorecard extraction.

name: supplier_name_present
expression: supplier_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(supplier_name)) > 0
description: supplier_name is required for Supplier Scorecard extraction.

name: on_time_delivery_rate_present
expression: on_time_delivery_rate IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(on_time_delivery_rate)) > 0
description: on_time_delivery_rate is required for Supplier Scorecard extraction.

name: quality_ppm_present
expression: quality_ppm IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(quality_ppm)) > 0
description: quality_ppm is required for Supplier Scorecard extraction.

name: overall_score_present
expression: overall_score IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(overall_score)) > 0
description: overall_score is required for Supplier Scorecard extraction.

name: on_time_delivery_rate_non_negative
description: on_time_delivery_rate should be non-negative when present.

name: quality_ppm_non_negative
description: quality_ppm should be non-negative when present.

name: nonconformance_count_non_negative
description: nonconformance_count should be non-negative when present.

name: cost_variance_percent_non_negative
description: cost_variance_percent should be non-negative when present.

name: overall_score_non_negative
description: overall_score should be non-negative when present.
